General.Name: International Entertainment Corp
General.Description: International Entertainment Corporation, an investment holding company, engages in the leasing of gaming venues at the hotel and casino complex in the Philippines. The company operates through Hotel Operation, Gaming Operation, and Live Events segments. It also operates hotels, which offers fitness centers, swimming pools, spa services, business centers, and meeting rooms, as well as fine dining, casual restaurants, and room and personalized services. The company was formerly known as Cyber On-Air Group Company Limited and changed its name to International Entertainment Corporation in December 2004. International Entertainment Corporation was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Three Exchange Square, Central, Hong Kong
